Geometry Rash

The little square loves to dance! Dangerous obstacles keep coming on his way. Follow the rhythm, let him jump over the obstacles, and keep him out of trouble! It may sound simple, but Geometry Rash is a 2D action platformer game requiring very fast response.

Play Geometry Rash Online

Loading game...
About Geometry Rash

The little square loves to dance! Dangerous obstacles keep coming on his way. Follow the rhythm, let him jump over the obstacles, and keep him out of trouble! It may sound simple, but Geometry Rash is a 2D action platformer game requiring very fast response. This browser game page adds original guidance and context so players can understand the challenge before the embedded game loads.

How to Play
  • Press play to load Geometry Rash in your browser.
  • Use the controls shown inside the game.
  • Keep practicing to improve your score and progress.
Game Features
Instant browser play Action game category Free online gameplay No download required
Frequently Asked Questions

Can I play Geometry Rash for free?

Yes. Geometry Rash is available as a free browser game on ArcadeNest.

Do I need to install Geometry Rash?

No installation is required. The game runs inside the browser iframe.
